title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif interviews Simon Eskildsen on infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, and the limitations of current AI coding agents. Discussion covers engineering principles, database innovation trends, and P99 engineer hiring in the AI era.
